THE RED MONKEY

— Sometimes the simple things in life are the best. We take Pilsner malt from Germany and combine with three traditional hop varieties - Magnum, Perle and Hallertauer Mittelfruh - to produce a clean, unfiltered, hop bitter lager beer. Vegan friendly.

On Tap

Neap Tide

3.8% Brown • Teignworthy

A good, tasty, fruity bitter. Tastes more than percentage depicts.

Red Kite

4.3% Brown • Vale

Warm toasted malt flavours create a rich bitter with a satisfying blend of chestnut and autumn spice.

Black As Yer 'At

4.3% Stout • Glastonbury

A traditional richly roasted dark stout that is the ultimate easy drinking black beer! Delicately hopped to give a dark long lasting full flavour with hints of chocolate and caramel from the malts. Lingering subtle dry finish.

HPA

4% Pale Ale • Wye Valley

Pale, hoppy, malty brew with a hint of sweetness before a dry finish.

Butty Bach

4.5% Bitter • Wye Valley

This smooth and satisfying premium ale is burnished gold in colour, and certainly has made a few friends in its time. Brewed using Maris Otter and Crystal malts, flaked barley, malted wheat, and locally grown Fuggles, Goldings and Bramling Cross hops.

Extra Nice Lager

4% Lager • Lost and Grounded

Brewed using Pilsner malt and a portion of rice in the grist to soften the palate, and gently hopped with Magnum and Tettnang, this lager is crisp, dry and deliciously refreshing! Collaboration with the Bleecker Burger crew to make a lager with purpose, donating a proportion from each can and keg sold to Stonewall Housing. Unfiltered and vegan friendly.

Fandango

4.8% Pale Ale • Wye Valley

Fandango is a limited-edition craft beer that you will not want to skip. Featuring Azacca and Comet hops, Fandango's light, citrusy undertones are a definite crowd-pleaser.

Keller Pils

4.8% Kellerbier • Lost and Grounded

Sometimes the simple things in life are the best. We take Pilsner malt from Germany and combine with three traditional hop varieties - Magnum, Perle and Hallertauer Mittelfruh - to produce a clean, unfiltered, hop bitter lager beer. Vegan friendly.

1985

4.5% Lager • Wye Valley

A lager, traditionally made using the finest ingredients including; locally grown Pilot hops, our very own ale yeast, and Extra Pale Maris Otter barley. A clean and refreshing pint - take just one sip and you'll know it's the best lager by a county mile!

Laser Juice

4.2% Session IPA • Bristol Beer Factory

A session IPA for all, supercharged with new-wave hop energy. Taking you from the New Mexico mountains with Sabro's iconic tangarine and orange to Cryo Pop's tropical blend hop glory. Gluten free and vegan friendly.

Brain Twister

5.8% Med/Dry Cider • Brislington

Vintage cider made from 100% apple juice.

Old Rosie (2019)

6.8% Med/Dry Cider • Westons

Old Rosie is the name given to our 1921 Aveling and Porter steam roller, that still sits in our yard in Herefordshire. Strong, reliable and so loved by everyone in the Westons family, we named this cloudy cider in her honour. Light, crisp and dry, this truly old fashioned cloudy cider is slowly matured and left unfiltered.

U.F.O. #5

5% Dry Cider • Tricky

Our new lower alcohol dry cider at 5% ABV. It is made from a blend of Dabinett and Jersey ciders and is remarkably smooth and easy to drink, full of flavour, low to medium tannins and a touch of bitterness. Made without additives such as Malic acid, 80% juice content, 20% water. The perfect lunchtime pint!

New Tradition

4.7% Med/Dry Cider • Iford

Fresh pressed, modern medium-dry West Country cider. Still and cloudy, blending the sweetest eating and crisp bittersweet cider apples to create the perfect balance.

Black Dragon

7.2% Medium Cider • Gwynt y Ddraig

The legendary Black Dragon! This medium cider now has quite a following amongst the most discerning cider drinkers. It is rich in colour, body and flavour with a fresh, fruity aroma.

North St Cider (keg)

4.8% Med/Dry Cider • Bristol Beer Factory

A medium dry, sparkling cider made with 100% British Bittersweet cider apples. Crisp, refreshing, and packed full of fresh apple goodness. Developed exclusively for Bristol Beer Factory by Westons. Gluten free and vegan friendly.
